title: CashFlowForecast
description: Projected balances over a horizon with the lowest point, runway days, and shortfall flags (FR-CORE-003; umbrella RunwayForecast). Provided by Module 0; consumed by Cash Safety, Bills, Pay, Goals, etc. Projections are MONEY outputs computed in integer cents from freshness-stamped balances; a stale balance input MUST flag/withhold the forecast (Constitution VIII — 'no runway calculation on a multi-day-old balance').

starting_balance.description: Net liquid starting position used as the forecast basis (integer cents). REQUIRED: every reported runway figure must carry the basis that produced it (Constitution VI — a money figure carries its inputs).

projected_lowest_balance.description: Lowest projected balance over the horizon, integer cents.

projected_lowest_on.description: Date the lowest point is projected to occur.

runway_days.description: Days until projected balance crosses the safety buffer (0 = at/under buffer now). User-adjustable runway buffer is applied before this is computed.

shortfall_flag.description: true if a projected balance breaches the safety buffer within the horizon (drives overdraft-risk / SafeToActSignal precedence in Cash Safety).

method.description: Forecast method actually used; insufficient_history ⇒ consumers treat the forecast as low-confidence and may withhold.

points.description: Optional per-day projection series for charting.

data_completeness.description: partial when computed on a partial account picture.
